feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: IDOC is send from ECC with status 03 but not showing up in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have IDOC being sent from ECC to SAP PO and not able to see it in SAP PO at adapter level nor in message monitoring. IDOC when triggered from ECC showing status code 03(Successful) and we don't see its stuck in SM58 nor in smq1.We don't also see it in SXMB_MONI in ecc. All the configurations like Port, RFC destinations in ECC and in NWA working fine. We were even getting the IDOC message in PO some days back but we don't see it now. But 1 weird thing we observed this time is that Sender IDOC adapter in PO is showing some message like "No rfc destination found for sid XX. will use default rfc destination for metadata read". So we created fresh sender channel and used in our ICO with same inboundRA details and its not showing this message at channel. ping test is getting successful for both cases.

Could you pls help if anything else to be checked apart from above.

1)Screenshot for Sender Channel showing some weird message

2) Created new channel with same inboundRA details which doesn't show this message.

 

 

 

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: Como tonar campo(s) disponíveis para edição na transação MIRO aba imposto retido fonte?
entry.content:
Olá, pessoal!

Poderiam me ajuda a realizar essa configuração para que o campo BASE IRF ME da aba da MIRO "Imp.ret.fonte" abaixo fique disponível para edição?

FIORI


SAP GUI

Tentei via SHD0 mas não encontrei a variante adequada.

Desde já, muito obrigado!

entry.title: Moving Average Price changing after procurement of free goods
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts 

I have a client requierement to not update the moving avec rage price of a material in case of free goods, 

I did the bellow test in SAP, and in the PO 3, the moving average was significately changed, what are the SAP good practices related to managing moving average and free goods

1- Is there any way (in standard config) where the moving average is not updated after free goods acquisition

2- what is the operationnal sap best practice related to dealing with free goods in logistic process, do I create a seperate materia code to deal with thos material in order to keep the moving average correct, do we cretae a seperate material type for them. What are the best SAP practices please to propose to a client regarding that ?

 

 MaterialPriceQtyMoving Average 
PO 1M000710010100 
PO 2M0007902093,33 
PO  3 : Free GoodsM00070 gratuit4040Moving Average Updated when procuring free goods

Thank you so much 

Regards, 

Aicha

entry.title: Availability check on MO with open OBD
entry.content:
Available qty: 2 EA

MO requirement qty: 2 EA

When the MO is created, the ATP commits the MO line with the available qty.

Once Outbound delivery is created for the MO, the material is allocated to OBD. ATP availablity check decommits the MO line.

entry.title: I have a z-table that has a list of PERNRs that need to be deleted in batch. How can I do this?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I store the PERNRs in an internal table and loop through it.  This is in a test environment, not Production.

Step 1:  I use fm HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA to set to clear out PA0003-ABRDT, and this works fine.

Step 2:  I need to run Submit RPUDEL20 to delete the payroll results.  How do I code this to suppress the screens, and can I check whether it was successful?  my SUBMIT statement is as follows:

      ls_seltab-selname = 'PNPPERNR'.
      ls_seltab-kind    = 'S'.
      ls_seltab-sign    = 'I'.
      ls_seltab-option  = 'EQ'.
      ls_seltab-low     = lv_pernr.
      CLEAR ls_seltab-high.
      APPEND ls_seltab TO lt_seltab.

  SUBMIT rpudel20 WITH SELECTION-TABLE lt_seltab
    AND RETURN
    EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY.

Step 3:  CALL TRANSACTION pu00 to delete the PERNR.  This doesn't work because step 2 fails.

Please help.

Thanks,
Dan

entry.title: Picking through PDA with TO's assigned by user
entry.content:
Currently, we perform picking using the sheets printed by ZPFSM02 and the labels, which we believe is somewhat outdated. We think there might be a way to assign the TOs to users so that each of them can see what picking they need to do on their PDA.

Is there a way to do this? I am talking about SAP GSI ERP.

I'm thinking in something like LI13N where you can see who must perform the inventory.

 

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Missing functionality in SAP note : 955860 - Invoice correction process with return movement (PL&HU)
entry.content:
Hello, 

The SAP Note 955860 cannot be applied in the public cloud environment, as it requires the creation of a new sales document type (RERK), which is not supported.

We are implementing a Public Cloud solution for a company operating in Poland, and therefore this legal requirement must be addressed. Could you provide alternative solutions or recommendations ? 

Thank you in advance,

Regards, 

Eva

entry.title: Year-End Process Duplicated – Retained Earnings Posted Twice
entry.content:
We've encountered an issue where the year-end process was duplicated. Two different users had the year-end closing window open simultaneously.

Initially, they were troubleshooting some errors, and both ended up executing the process. Instead of SAP preventing the duplicate execution or crashing for one of them, the system allowed both executions, resulting in the same amount being posted to Retained Earnings twice.

Has anyone experienced this issue before? Any insights on why this happened?

Thanks

entry.title: PR release cancellation - hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, 

Could you please advise if it is possible to cancel PR release in the reversal order? The PR is approved By the approver 1 and approver 2 (the approver 1 approves first)/ But in case we need to cancel the approval it can be un-approved in any order by any approver. What business wants is that the PR to be un-approved by approver 2 first, and then - by the approver 1. Other order is unacceptable. 

I tried to play with settings on header and item level but they do not have any effect on the order of approval cancellation..

entry.title: Hierarchy Extractors Are Not Displayed by ODP
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have the following scenario:

SAP ERP activates the 0COSTELMNT_0102_HIER extractor using the T SE38 BS_ANLY_DS_RELEASE_ODP and also uses RODPS_OS_EXPOSE.

RSA6 is checked and comes out active.

then I check the ROOTATTR table and the extractor is not there.

I show the version that is currently available.

Note: No hierarchy extractors are displayed in Datasphere, but ATTRs and TXTs are displayed

Any solution? or why I can't activate them by ODP to view them in Datasphere?

Thank you for your collaboration.

entry.title: SAP SARA WRITE to file. What file type is the file? Ascii, binary?
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working on archiving/deleting old IDOCS.  I'm using tcode SARA to test this.  When setting up the logical file, what should be the data type?

Is there a way to view the file to see what's in it?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Schedule Margin Key (SMK) Not Functioning/Driving Early MRP Requirements
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for two-pronged support:

1. I am currently trying to get schedule margin keys implemented in an effort to drive material requirements ahead of planned need (based on existing IHPT), without using either GR processing time or increasing IHPTs. I have schedule margin keys configured to add 20 days (separately) to opening period, float after production, float before production, and release period. I have configured materials with the different SMKs (except float after production), but none are driving changes to the component requirement dates. Does anyone have an idea as to what may be preventing the SMKs from driving different material requirement dates?

2. If my understanding of SMKs is incorrect and they cannot be configured to drive early material requirements without changing IHPTs, what other methods exist to accomplish this end goal? I understand you can apply individual component lead time offsets, but the bills of materials I have are long and I have a lot of final assembly materials so it's an extensive effort. I have also looked at applying safety time but, again, it didn't seem to work similarly to the SMKs.

Thank you.

entry.title: CLMM MASS UPDATE CLASS TYPE 013 Classification Controlling of production orders
entry.content:
Hello
I need to mass update the characteristic values ​​for about 100 production orders. I tried to use CLMM as I usually use it to mass update  characteristics from  class type  for material . CLMM does not allow objects of class 013. Here is the error message returned.

 

 

I tried but I don't know how but I succeed once to have the authorisation for object type class 013 but I can't reproduce it

 

Is there a special setting to be made in CLMM to be able to modify the characteristics of class 013?If not, how can I mass modify the characteristic values ​​of several production orders?

entry.title: Where is the unlimited overdelivery allowed indicator is configurated?
entry.content:
I need to know where is this indicator configurated to automatically so that it is automatically marked in all my service POs.

Also want to know what this unlimited overdeliver indicator exact functionality is?

entry.title: Hi Experts i am trying to manipulate shelf life expiration date from badi VB_SLED_MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
But when i am putting debugged IF_EX_VB_SLED_MANAGEMENT~MAINTAIN_SLED_PARAMETERS but its not triggering from MSC1/2/3n or from migo and when i do a where used list on VB_SLED_MANAGEMENT i am not getting any result in hana system. Can someone please help me to understand how to trigger debugging for this it will be of great help.

As i see this badi is there in the official sap help document for sled determnation for batch.

entry.title: Issue Regarding Querying the Actual Payment Amount for Purchase Orders
entry.content: 查询采购订单实际付款金额的问题 Issue Regarding Querying the Actual Payment Amount for Purchase Orders （System: ERP6.0, ECC EHP8）实际业务中用户有查询采购订单实际付款金额的需求。已开发报表通过取已清表bsak中采购订单字段的数据来取已付金额，即发票校验环节应付行项目采购订单字段。但是该字段数据存在问题，导致已付金额取值不准，该字段的详细问题过程如下： In actual business operations, users have a requirement to query the actual payment amount for purchase orders. A custom report was developed to retrieve the paid amount by extracting data from the purchase order field in the cleared items table BSAK, which corresponds to the purchase order field in the payable line items during the invoice verification process. However, there are issues with the data in this field, leading to inaccurate retrieval of the paid amount. The detailed issues with this field are outlined below: 1、系统刚上线时。发票校验环节，生成的会计凭证中应付行项目的采购订单字段为空。 1. During the initial system go-live phase, in the invoice verification process, the purchase order field in the payable line items of the generated accounting documents was empty. 2、2021年6月，关于发票校验环节采购订单字段的多个功能增强传输到生产系统，此处涉及以下两个功能增强点： 2. In June 2021, multiple functional enhancements related to the purchase order fields in the invoice verification process were transported to the production system. This involved the following two enhancement points: （1）功能增强点一：为发票校验会计凭证的应付行项目的采购订单字段赋值 (1) Enhancement Point 1: Populating the purchase order field in the payable line items of accounting documents generated during invoice verification. ①部分程序增强内容如下： ①Enhancements to some programs include the following: ②该程序增强的业务逻辑是应付行项目的采购订单字段取采购凭证中的其他行的采购订单字段，如下图： ②The enhanced business logic of this program is that the purchase order field in the accounts payable line item retrieves the purchase order fields from other lines within the purchase document, as shown in the figure below: ③该方式存在的问题是：若一张发票校验凭证涉及多笔采购订单，生成的会计凭证的供应商挂账会将多笔采购订单进行合并。导致应付行项目的金额是多笔订单的合计应付金额，而应付行项目的采购订单字段是发票校验涉及的其中一个采购订单号。如下图所示： ③The issue with this method is: If an invoice verification document involves multiple purchase orders, the generated accounting document will consolidate the vendor liabilities across those purchase orders. This results in the accounts payable line item amount reflecting the total payable sum of multiple orders, while the purchase order field in the payable line item only displays one of the involved purchase order numbers. As shown in the example below: （2）功能增强点二：在金额分摊页签新增了采购订单字段 (2) Functional Enhancement 2: Added the Purchase Order field in the Amount Distribution tab ①部分程序增强内容如下： ①Partial program enhancements are as follows: ②该程序增强的业务逻辑是通过金额分摊页签录入不同的采购订单的金额 ②The enhanced business logic of the program allows entering amounts for different purchase orders through the Amount Allocation tab. ③存在的问题是：回车后采购订单字段被强制清空，生成的会计凭证的应付行项目的采购订单字段仍为空。 ③The existing issues are: after pressing Enter, the purchase order field is forcibly cleared, and the purchase order field in the accounts payable (AP) line item of the generated accounting document remains empty. ④总结：这个采购订单会被清空的问题，通过修改增强程序能够解决，当时的业务顾问想验证一下后续的付款操作是否会出现问题。尝试在系统里直接写入EBELN数据进行测试，发现即使这一步操作后，BSEG里的EBELN有值，但是付款时仍然会被合并。所以该功能增强未进一步推进。 ④Summary: The issue where the purchase order (PO) field is cleared can be resolved by modifying the enhanced program. However, the business consultant at the time wanted to verify whether subsequent payment operations would encounter problems. Testing was conducted by directly writing EBELN (PO number) data into the system. It was discovered that even after this step, although the EBELN field in BSEG (accounting document line items) contained a value, payments were still consolidated during processing. As a result, further development of this enhancement was halted. 基于以上原因，已开发报表中的采购订单实际付款金额并不准确。希望SAP团队提供技术支持解决该问题，或其他方式取到采购订单的实际已付金额。 Based on the above reason/description, the actual payment amounts for purchase orders in the developed report are currently inaccurate. We request technical support from the SAP team to resolve this issue or provide alternative methods to accurately retrieve the actual paid amounts for purchase orders.

entry.title: Automatic Batch Determination Issue in EWM (S/4HANA Cloud 2502)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,
We (on the customer’s side) are currently in an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation project, transitioning to the 2502 release. We've encountered a significant issue with automatic batch determination in our EWM-managed storage locations, and we are looking for insights from the community.

In the previous 2408 release, we observed that automatic batch determination was functioning correctly during outbound delivery creation. However, after upgrading to 2502, this functionality has ceased.
Our automatic batch determination is based on Condition Records. Specifically, we have configured condition records that define a minimum BBD (Best Before Date) for each customer and product combination. This ensures that customers receive products with an acceptable remaining shelf life.

The issue we are facing is that the system is no longer automatically selecting batches based on these condition records in the EWM warehouse during outbound delivery creation. We understand that with EWM managed storage locations, the final batch selection is done in EWM.
Given that this functionality was working in 2408, and is now failing in 2502, we suspect either a change in standard behavior or a potential misconfiguration on our end.

We have opened an SAP case regarding this issue. So far, SAP support has indicated that automatic batch determination is not possible in EWM-managed storage locations, and that only manual batch determination is available. However, we interpret note 3400017 as indicating that automatic batch determination can happen in EWM.

Our questions are:
1. Has anyone successfully configured automatic batch determination in EWM in version 2502, and if so, could you share your configuration approach?
2. Are there any known changes in the 2502 release that could affect automatic batch determination in EWM-managed storage locations?
3. Could anyone suggest specific configuration steps or checks we should perform to ensure our Condition Records are correctly being processed by EWM for batch determination?
Any help here would be really appreciated

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Procurement
entry.content:
Hi team , 

is there any option to make distinction between Direct vs indirect Material in SAP ?

Thanks .

entry.title: issue in MIR7 double amount is showing in the tax
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are not able to process invoice due to double amount showing while releasing the invoice using MIR7.

This is happening only for this invoice and this is new vendor .The SES AMOUNT Is showing correctly.

entry.title: Display totals lines above the entries in S_PL0_86000032?
entry.content:
I want to show the total lines above the entries. However, this 'Display' option is not working for the financial statement version subtotals (yellow):

So I guess I need to change this on the report form?
How do I know which form is being used, and can it be edited in FGI2?
